name: Document List
notes: Sub-panel of DocumentGrid. Renders the filtered+sorted document set in either grid (card tiles) or list (compact rows) layout depending on state.viewMode.
displayDocs is computed inside render() by chaining filterDocuments(documents, filters) → sortDocuments(result, sortBy); no extra API call is issued when filters or sort change.

Data source switches between GET /api/documents (full list on mount/refresh) and GET /api/search?q={query} (search results when the search bar has a non-empty query); both responses overwrite state.documents.
Three mutually exclusive overlay states take priority over the list: loading ('Loading documents...'), error (message + Retry button), and empty (📂 'No documents found' + hint).
